iot.jobtemplate.maintenancewindow.CfnAbo: An optional configuration within the `SchedulingConfig` to setup a recurring maintenance window with a predetermined start time and duration for the rollout of a job document to all devices in a target group for a job.

iot.jobtemplate.maintenancewindow.Durati.Description: Displays the duration of the next maintenance window.

iot.jobtemplate.maintenancewindow.StartT.Description: Displays the start time of the next maintenance window.
